channel.title: Navigation on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in Navigation on Kayra Sari

item.title: E6B Flight Computer
item.description: A browser-based digital flight computer modeled after the classic E6B circular slide rule. Covers wind correction, time/speed/distance, fuel planning, true airspeed, density altitude, crosswind components, and top of descent — all computed client-side with a live vector diagram.
